title: Different SPARUL results via HTTP interface and Conductor
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
